queries.question: show me the top university
queries.sql: select universityname from universities ORDER BY admissionRate DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?universityname WHERE {
  ?universities a :Universities .
  ?universities p:universityName ?universityname .
  ?universities p:admissionRate ?admissionrate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?admissionrate_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: show me the top university
queries.sql: select universityname from universities ORDER BY ranking DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?universityname WHERE {
  ?universities a :Universities .
  ?universities p:universityName ?universityname .
  ?universities p:ranking ?ranking_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?ranking_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: show me the top university
queries.sql: select universityname from universities ORDER BY admissionRate, ranking DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?universityname WHERE {
  ?universities a :Universities .
  ?universities p:universityName ?universityname .
  ?universities p:admissionRate ?admissionrate_o .
  ?universities p:ranking ?ranking_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?admissionrate_o) DESC(?ranking_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: List the universities and their admission rate and ranking.
queries.sql: select universityname, admissionRate, ranking from universities
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?universityname ?admissionrate ?ranking WHERE {
  ?universities a :Universities .
  ?universities p:universityName ?universityname .
  ?universities p:admissionRate ?admissionrate .
  ?universities p:ranking ?ranking .
}
